clauses.obligation: Standard definitions including Affiliate, Confidential Information, Control, Gross Sales, MSA, Principal, Proprietary Marks, Sonic System
key_terms: Gross Sales excludes sales tax, refunds, gift card sales, restaurant sale proceeds
Principal must own >50% and have unilateral control authority

clauses.obligation: Non-exclusive license to operate one Sonic Restaurant at the Site
restrictions: Must operate only at approved Site
License is personal and non-transferable except per Section 14

clauses.obligation: If entity franchisee: 10%+ owners must sign Guaranty and Assumption of Obligations
Locate Site within 90 days of signing FA; Sonic evaluates and accepts/rejects within 30 days
clauses.carveouts: If Site not located in 90 days, Sonic may terminate

clauses.obligation: Lease must contain terms acceptable to Sonic; must execute Option to Assume Lease (Exhibit I)
restrictions: Cannot modify lease without Sonic approval

clauses.obligation: Develop per Sonic Plans and Specifications; no deviations without prior written approval; submit record drawings before opening
clauses.money: All development costs borne by franchisee

clauses.obligation: Open within 1 year of Site acceptance (or DA date if earlier); must have training completed, amounts paid, written authorization
clauses.trigger: Failure to open on time = termination right
clauses.money: Development cost report within 120 days of opening

clauses.obligation: Protected Area radius 0.75-3 miles based on population density
restrictions: Not exclusive — excludes prior areas, Non-Drive-In, Non-Traditional
May shrink based on census data
carveouts: Franchisor reserves rights to other brands, internet, dissimilar products, Sonic outside PA, acquisition by competitor

clauses.obligation: 10 years from Restaurant opening date
2 additional 10-year terms
conditions: Sign then-current FA (materially different terms permitted)
exceptions: Then-current FA may have different royalty, advertising fees, Protected Area

clauses.obligation: Principal + 2 must complete Sonic Training Program; at least 1 trained individual full-time; GM Leadership Class required
clauses.money: First 3 trainees included; $5,000/person additional; $250/person GM class; franchisee pays all travel/living

clauses.obligation: 5% of Gross Sales monthly, payable by 10th of following month
0.90% of Gross Sales monthly to SBF
3.25%-5% of Gross Sales to SMF and advertising cooperative combined; franchisee must join or form cooperative in DMA
Comply with Ops Manual (733 pages); approved suppliers only; maintain equipment; remodel per Sonic specs
clauses.trigger: Remodeling: max once every 7 years (not within first 3 years unless standards change)

clauses.obligation: Franchisee is sole employer — Sonic does not control labor/employment matters
rights: Sonic guidance on employment is optional, not mandatory
exceptions: Sonic retains indirect control over product quality

clauses.obligation: Acquire and maintain insurance per Sonic specs; name Sonic as additional insured and loss payee; waiver of subrogation; 30 days notice of cancellation
clauses.trigger: If franchisee fails to obtain, Sonic may obtain at franchisee expense
clauses.money: Insurance costs borne by franchisee; amounts increase per Sonic notice with 60 days compliance

clauses.obligation: No transfer without Sonic's prior written consent
restrictions: Any direct/indirect transfer of FA, Restaurant, assets, or ownership interests requires approval
Includes any pledge, mortgage, or encumbrance

clauses.obligation: 8 conditions for approval: good standing, transferee qualifies/trains, transfer fee, upgrade to current standards, release, Sonic determines price/terms acceptable
exceptions: Transferee signs then-current FA (may differ materially)
Cannot do public offering of ownership interests

clauses.obligation: Transfer within greater of 120 days or probate completion
clauses.trigger: Death or disability (30+ consecutive days unable to supervise)

clauses.obligation: Sonic has 30 days to match any bona fide third-party offer for franchise or controlling ownership
clauses.trigger: Franchisee receives and desires to accept offer
clauses.money: Same terms as third-party offer; closing within 60 days of exercise

clauses.obligation: Sonic may freely assign FA without franchisee consent
Immediate termination for 10+ non-curable defaults
triggers: Felony or crime of moral turpitude
Underreporting Gross Sales by 3%+ for 2+ periods
Default under any other Sonic agreement

clauses.obligation: 10 days cure for payment defaults; 30 days cure for non-payment defaults
exceptions: If default not cured within cure period, termination is immediate

clauses.obligation: Pay all amounts due; cease use of marks; return manuals; de-identify within 15 days; discontinue any indication of Sonic relationship; sell patented/unique equipment to Sonic at FMV if requested
Sonic has 30-day option to purchase Restaurant Assets at FMV (for use other than as Sonic going concern)
clauses.money: FMV determined by 3 appraisers if parties disagree
exceptions: Excludes franchise rights, goodwill attributable to marks, Confidential Information

clauses.obligation: Sonic may assume management pending purchase; 3% management fee
clauses.money: 3% of Gross Sales plus direct costs

clauses.obligation: No direct/indirect involvement in any competing business during FA term
restrictions: Applies to franchisee, Principal, and owners
Competing business = any business selling products substantially similar to Sonic products

clauses.obligation: 18 months post-expiration/termination: no competing business at or within 3 miles of former Restaurant or any other Sonic Restaurant
exceptions: Also cannot be landlord of competing business within restricted area

clauses.obligation: Sonic may unilaterally reduce scope; franchisee consents to ex parte injunctions for violations
rights: Franchisee claims against Sonic not a defense to noncompete enforcement

clauses.obligation: Franchisee indemnifies Sonic for all losses from restaurant operations, breach, noncompliance with laws, employment claims, IP infringement claims
clauses.trigger: Any claim or loss arising from restaurant

clauses.obligation: Prevailing party recovers reasonable costs, expenses, and attorneys' fees
FA is entire agreement; supersedes all prior discussions; nothing disclaims FDD representations
No amendment except written agreement signed by both parties (subject to Sonic's right to modify Ops Manual)
Each provision severable; restrictive covenants enforced to fullest permissible extent
Litigation in state/federal courts in county of Sonic headquarters (currently Atlanta, GA)
Georgia law governs
Mutual waiver of right to jury trial
Claims must be brought within 1 year of discovery (or shorter period if applicable state law requires)
No statement/questionnaire waives state franchise law claims or disclaims reliance on franchisor statements
Sonic will consult franchisee advisory body for significant system changes (training, Sonic system, Ops Manual, SMF, SBF, beverage supplier, ad agency)
clauses.trigger: Only if FA provision in ≥1/3 of all FAs

guaranty_exhibit.description: Guaranty and Assumption of Obligations — 10%+ owners personally guarantee all FA obligations, jointly and severally

distinctive_clauses: Materially different terms at renewal (Section 5.02(d)) — royalty, fees, Protected Area may all change
3+ defaults in 12 months (whether cured) = non-curable termination trigger
Underreporting Gross Sales by 3%+ for 2+ periods = non-curable termination trigger
Sonic may unilaterally reduce noncompete scope without franchisee consent (Section 17.07)
Remodeling max once every 7 years, not within first 3 years unless standards change (Section 8.07)
Franchisor has unlimited independent POS data access
